[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000001 1
1 01101010 4
2 00010001 2
3 10110010 4
4 10111001 5
5 01110010 4
6 01100010 3
7 00010001 2

01 10 00000001 1 match 0
12 21 00000000 a
23 32 00000000 a
34 43 00010000 1
45 54 00100010 2
56 65 01100010 3 match 6
67 76 00000000 a
70 07 00001000 1

02 20 01001010 3
13 31 00000001 1 match 0
24 42 00100010 2
35 53 00000000 a
46 64 00110010 3
57 75 00000000 a
60 06 01010011 4
71 17 00000000 a

03 30 00010001 2 match 2 7
14 41 00000000 a
25 52 01100010 3 match 6
36 63 00010001 2 match 2 7
47 74 00000000 a
50 05 01000010 2
61 16 00000001 1 match 0
72 27 00001000 1

04 40 10010010 3
15 51 00000000 a
26 62 01100010 3 match 6
37 73 00000000 a
